title: Next.js Contentlayer Blog Starter
description: A blog template with Next.js 13 App Router, Contentlayer, Tailwind CSS and dark mode.
usefulLines: Portfolio site with pageview counter, built with Next.js 13 App Router, Contentlayer, and Upstash Redis.
noiseLines: Deploy at the speed of AI
summary: Next.js Contentlayer Blog Starter is a Blog reference with verified Next.js codebase, App Router structure, editorial content hierarchy. Verdict: valid.

selectedFiles.excerpt:
# Next.js + Contentlayer

A template with Next.js 13 app dir, Contentlayer, Tailwind CSS and dark mode.

https://next-contentlayer.vercel.app

{
  "name": "next-contentlayer",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "preview": "next build && next start",
    "start": "next start",

  },

    "@tailwindcss/typography": "^0.5.9",

}
